name: AudioEye
description: AudioEye — Automated web accessibility platform with AI-assisted WCAG remediation and human certification services.

seo.title: AudioEye — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: AudioEye: AudioEye — Automated web accessibility platform with AI-assisted WCAG remediation and human certification services.

when_to_use: WCAG 2.1 automated remediation for e-commerce storefronts
ADA compliance certification for federal contractor sites
Human-assisted accessibility certification for legal coverage
Screen reader optimization for SaaS dashboard interfaces
Ongoing WCAG regression testing on CI/CD deployments

pros: Combines automated fixes with human certified audits
Issue reporting dashboard shows tracked remediations
CMS plugins for WordPress, Shopify, Drupal
Legal support included in higher tiers
cons: Widget approach shares the same overlay criticisms as competitors
Human audit cadence may lag rapid site changes
Reporting can feel opaque about what was actually fixed
Annual contracts lock in long before you can evaluate
review.verdict: A middle-ground overlay-plus-human model — better than pure automation, still no substitute for native accessibility.
review.best_for: SMB sites wanting documented accessibility efforts without rebuilding markup
review.not_for: Engineering-led teams who should instead fix accessibility at the source
